item.title: Live Updates: Israel Pummels Beirut, Intensifying Strikes on Hezbollah
item.description: Thousands fled the heaviest Israeli attacks on Lebanon’s capital since a 2024 war with the Iran-backed militia. Israel also said it was hitting Tehran...

item.title: As Trump Out-Putins Putin, Russia’s Global Influence Erodes
item.description: The conflict in Iran may give Moscow a short-term boost economically and in Ukraine. But it has also shown the limits of Russia’s partnerships.

item.title: Indonesia to Block Children Under 16 From Social Media
item.description: The ban is to take effect March 28, according to a government minister, but details about how it would be implemented were scarce.

item.title: 4 Arrested in London on Suspicion of Spying on Jews for Iran
item.description: The police said one Iranian and three British-Iranians were detained as part of a counterterrorism investigation.
